title: Needle Felted Miniature AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable needle felted miniature with needle-felted miniature scene with fuzzy wool texture, toy-scale staging, and soft handcrafted lighting. Transform the subject into a handcrafted needle-felted wool miniature. Material: organic roving wool with visible needle-punch textures, soft fuzzy surface, and handcrafted seams. Eyes are tiny black bead eyes or simple felted circles. Soft studio lighting with warm highlights and gentle shadows. Reference. Subject: the subject from the reference image translated into a tiny wool figure. Felt Material: soft needle-felted wool fibers with visible fuzzy texture and gentle rounded forms. Miniature Pose: same recognizable pose and silhouette as the reference, simplified into handmade proportions. Craft Details: stitched eyes, tiny accessory shapes, color-matched outfit blocks, and subtle fiber strands. Display Setting: clean tabletop craft studio with felting needles, wool roving, and scale cues. Photo Style: macro product photography, soft daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic handmade imperfections. Subject: Make the subject from the reference image translated into a tiny wool figure the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in clean tabletop craft studio with felting needles, wool roving, and scale cues. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use needle-felted wool miniature transformation layout preserving these mechanics: reference-to-miniature transformation, needle-felted material texture, handmade macro product-photo feel. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in macro product photography, soft daylight, shallow depth of field, realistic handmade imperfections. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Transform the subject into a handcrafted needle-felted wool miniature. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
